allowed_claims_if_success: Codex CLI roles executed once for a bounded DR mesh smoke with transcript, artifact, event, and claim custody.
The run exercised the Grep-shaped planner, branch, synthesis, review, re-entry, and writer topology for one DRACO tiny-smoke pointer.

approval.approval_note: Principal explicitly authorized live Codex DR mesh execution in chat on 2026-04-23. This second named smoke is a corrective run after draco_live_mesh_001 exposed and gated a writer-before-reentry dependency-order defect. Execution is limited to this named run id, one attempt, one case, one re-entry round, foreground supervision, transcript capture, and blocked scoring.

allowed_sources: public web sources discovered by the approved live smoke run
sandbox/codex-dr docs, harness specs, and run manifests copied or summarized into role prompts
inputs.data_policy: Raw/full benchmark data must remain out of git. This smoke may use the existing DRACO row pointer and public web sources; it may not persist secrets, customer data, root env files, private benchmark corpora, or paid benchmark corpora.
forbidden_sources: paid benchmark corpora unless separately authorized
large raw benchmark files in git

operational_bounds.external_monitoring: foreground coordinator supervision in this Codex thread
operational_bounds.kill_path: coordinator terminates the foreground mesh-execute-live process with Ctrl-C/SIGINT, then SIGTERM if needed
operational_bounds.notes: The executor applies the wall-clock bound per Codex CLI role. No automatic retry is permitted.

run_purpose: Execute a corrected bounded live Codex CLI DR mesh smoke after the first smoke exposed writer-before-reentry ordering.

runner.approval_policy: never; non-interactive Codex CLI role execution only under this receipt
runner.transcript_wrapper: mesh-execute-live subprocess capture of codex exec --json stdout/stderr

scoring.retry_policy: no scorer retries in this smoke
scoring.variance_policy: unavailable until scorer bridge is separately approved

hard_stop: run leaves approved cwd or output roots
unexpected secret or private data exposure
automatic retry requested without explicit approval
required transcript or run-bundle path unavailable
any role fails to produce its declared output files
soft_stop: branch evidence is too thin for score claims
reviewer requests more re-entry rounds than this receipt allows
